Global (All).title: Cyber-attack on US Government Agency Exposed by Russian Hackers
Global (All).summary: Russian hackers have breached a US government agency, gaining access to sensitive information.

Global (All).title: Global Protests Against COVID-19 Restrictions Intensify
Global (All).summary: Protests against COVID-19 restrictions have become increasingly violent and widespread across the globe.

Global (All).title: US-China Trade Tensions Escalate Over Economic Coercion
Global (All).summary: Tensions between the US and China have escalated over allegations of economic coercion, raising concerns about a potential trade war.

United States.title: Federal judge temporarily blocks Mississippi 15-week abortion ban
United States.summary: The ruling comes after the US Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, a landmark decision that protected a woman's right to an abortion. The judge's decision blocks the state's 15-week abortion ban from taking effect until July 23.

United States.title: US to send high-tech artillery to Ukraine as part of $400M package
United States.summary: The Biden administration is sending a package to Ukraine worth nearly $400 million, which includes 45 155mm howitzers and 500 rounds of precision-guided artillery projectiles. This is another step in the US effort to support Ukraine in its fight against Russia.

United States.title: New York lawmakers to pass legislation to make abortion access a fundamental right
United States.summary: New York is expected to pass legislation making access to abortion a fundamental right in the state. This move comes after the US Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, leaving individual states to decide on their own abortion laws.

South Korea.title: North Korea warns US of 'destruction' over sanctions
South Korea.summary: North Korea has threatened the United States with "destruction" after President Joe Biden announced plans to impose additional economic sanctions on the regime.

South Korea.title: South Koreans protest against military drills with US
South Korea.summary: Protesters in South Korea have taken to the streets to express their opposition to joint military drills between South Korea and the United States.

South Korea.title: South Korea reports record high daily COVID-19 cases
South Korea.summary: South Korea has reported a record high of daily COVID-19 cases, prompting concerns about the spread of the virus and the impact on the country's healthcare system.

Japan.title: Japan’s Fukuoka Prefecture Issues J-Alerts After North Korea’s Missile Launch
Japan.summary: The J-Alert system was activated in Japan’s Fukuoka Prefecture after North Korea launched a ballistic missile, prompting residents to take necessary precautions.

Japan.title: Japan Faces Power Crunch as Unstable Weather Disrupts Nuclear Reactors
Japan.summary: Japan is facing a potential power crunch as unstable weather conditions disrupt the operation of nuclear reactors, leading to concerns about energy security.

Japan.title: Japan’s Inflation Rate Continues to Rise, Raising Fears of Economic Consequences
Japan.summary: Japan’s inflation rate has continued to rise, fueling concerns about the potential economic consequences, including higher interest rates and reduced consumer spending.
